# Summary

<!-- One or two sentences describing what changed and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] chore — tooling, deps, build
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] refactor — no behaviour change
- [ ] test — adding or updating tests

## Scope

- [ ] backend
- [ ] frontend
- [ ] infra / CI
- [ ] docs

## Day plan reference

<!-- Which day + task ID from DEVELOPMENT_PLAN.md §16 (e.g. Day 1, task 1.6)? -->

## Test plan

- [ ] Unit / integration tests added or updated
- [ ] Manual smoke test performed
- [ ] CI passing

## Screenshots (if UI)

<!-- Drag in screenshots or remove this section. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Conventional commit message used (`feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`, ...)
- [ ] No secrets, env files, or credentials committed
- [ ] Branch is up to date with `develop`
